data.body: FIX VERIFIED (not yet committed due to concurrent worktree activity per INC-005): Change in tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-start-writes.sh line 89 - replace single-line grep finding first WORKTREE_TRACKING:start globally with a loop that only counts occurrences AFTER _transition_line. Root cause: SKILL.md line 179 has a resume-scan description referencing WORKTREE_TRACKING:start BEFORE the actual in_progress transition at line 200. The instruction to POST WORKTREE_TRACKING:start is at line 202. The fix: search only lines > _transition_line. All 6 tests pass with fix applied.
